explanation: The user asks to 'get the bowl from the fridge'. The state shows that there are two bowls: bowl_0 is on top of a drawer and bowl_1 is on top of the fridge. The old plan already successfully found bowl_1, indicating it is the intended object. Since the fridge is open and bowl_1 is inside, I need to go to the fridge, open it (if not already open), and pick up bowl_1. The plan follows the correct sequence: first move to the fridge, open it, then pick up the bowl. The object bowl_1 is used because it is the one explicitly mentioned in the state as being inside the fridge and is the only bowl referenced in that location.
